overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city plaza at night. The character moves past digital billboards, NPCs, and urban debris before reaching a street with moving traffic and a view of the towering cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with cylindrical ad tower

events.description: character passes a standing NPC and continues walking forward through the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza toward a cylindrical building covered in rotating digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: standing against wall looking at phone or device

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped with multiple digital billboards displaying rotating advertisements
bright purple neon light strip running vertically along the building edge
dark glass building with illuminated 'DATA INC' signage visible on facade
large cylindrical red planters containing trees lining the plaza walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide futuristic plaza at night, illuminated by vibrant neon lights. A prominent cylindrical tower covered in digital billboards dominates the center view, while the DATA INC building looms on the left. Sparse pedestrians stand around as the character moves forward past red planters and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with large wall-mounted advertisements and homeless NPCs

events.description: moves from open plaza to narrow sidewalk along building wall with large billboards
passes under a covered archway with blue neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the building wall passing NPCs standing and sitting on the ground near scattered trash

notable_agents.action: standing against wall with arms crossed near large billboard
sitting on ground leaning against wall next to trash

entered.detail: massive wall-mounted billboard with orange frame displaying advertisements
covered walkway with blue neon lighting leading under the building structure
scattered newspapers and litter on the sidewalk near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open plaza to a narrower sidewalk running along a building wall. Large orange-framed billboards illuminate the area while NPCs stand or sit against the wall near scattered trash. The character continues forward, passing under a covered archway with blue neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level plaza with view of traffic and downtown skyscrapers

events.description: exits the covered archway into open street-level area with view of city traffic
vehicles visible moving along the multi-lane road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the street edge, observing the traffic and towering cityscape with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza wearing bright red pants

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel towers with illuminated windows forming the skyline
raised highway or monorail structure crossing above the street level
illuminated traffic signals showing red light
futuristic cars and taxis driving along the multi-lane road
giant digital screens on building facades displaying character advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a wide-open street-level plaza with a dramatic view of the futuristic cityscape. Towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards dominate the background, while an elevated highway crosses overhead. The character approaches the street where sparse traffic moves along the road, and other pedestrians walk through the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic plaza that transitions from an open square into a narrow urban corridor before emerging into a sprawling cityscape. It begins by moving through a wide plaza dominated by a cylindrical tower of digital billboards and the looming DATA INC building, passing red planters and sparse pedestrians. As the character moves forward, the open space shifts into a narrower sidewalk lined with orange-framed billboards and scattered trash, leading the camera under a blue-lit covered archway. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the underpass into a wide street-level plaza, revealing a dramatic vista of towering skyscrapers and an elevated highway overhead. Finally, the camera approaches the road where sparse traffic flows beneath the massive digital displays of the distant skyline.
